highlights.description: Dependency graph analysis for multi-org module relationships
Graph visualization in DOT (Graphviz) and Mermaid formats
Repository moved to plexusone GitHub organization

added.description: Dependency graph package for analyzing module relationships
go.mod parser with support for require, replace, and exclude directives
Graph builder to fetch and analyze modules from GitHub repos
Topological sort for correct upgrade ordering
Multi-org portfolio support with org and language filtering
CLI commands: `graph build`, `graph dependents`, `graph dependencies`, `graph order`, `graph stale`, `graph stats`
CLI command: `graph visualize` with DOT and Mermaid format options
Caching layer with memory and file backends, TTL support
Rate limiting with automatic retry via `mogo/net/http/retryhttp`
Cache CLI options: `--cache`, `--cache-dir`, `--cache-ttl`, `--no-cache`
Progress reporting for graph build operations

documentation.description: GitHub token permissions table in README
Multi-language support design with Language enum and ManifestParser interface
Git repo storage design for dependency graph persistence

testing.description: Unit tests for go.mod parser (require blocks, replace, exclude, comments)
Unit tests for graph algorithms (dependents, dependencies, topological sort)
Unit tests for filtering by org and language
Unit tests for cache (memory, file, expiration, pruning)
Unit tests for DOT/Mermaid visualization (clustering, external deps, escaping)
Integration tests with mocked GitHub API

highlights.description: Automated dependency PR management across multiple GitHub organizations
Policy-based auto-review and merge of Renovate/Dependabot PRs
Maintenance release creation with semantic version bumping

added.description: CLI with `scan`, `review`, `merge`, `release`, and `version` commands using Cobra framework
GitHub collector for dependency PR discovery across organizations
Detection of Renovate and Dependabot PRs by author identification
PR metadata extraction including dependency name, versions, and update type
Cedar policy engine for auto-merge decisions
Three built-in merge profiles: `aggressive`, `balanced`, `conservative`
PR merger with squash, merge, and rebase strategies
Release creator with semantic version bumping (patch releases)
JSON and Markdown report formats
Dry-run mode for all write operations
Example Cedar policy for auto-merge patch updates

documentation.description: README with installation, usage, and examples
PRD, MRD, and TRD product documents
Scheduled graph upgrades and release propagation

chores.description: Initial project setup with go.mod, LICENSE, and CI workflow
